title: More Creatures And Weapons
description:
This mod adds 24 mobs (8 monsters and 16 animals). Two types of weapon are added: spear and dagger.
See below for other additions to this mod.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p3SdrGdw/images/ea56f145bb703179d32061b4c9448dafe4432d7c.png)


This mod adds 24 mobs (8 monsters and 16 animals). Two types of weapon are added: spear and dagger. See below for other additions to this mod.

![Troll](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p3SdrGdw/images/ed616fc31a7433c255970542b5ba7ff11460c6e3.png)

<details>
<summary>Monster</summary>
  
![Troll](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p3SdrGdw/images/ed616fc31a7433c255970542b5ba7ff11460c6e3.png)
![Monster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p3SdrGdw/images/7deb7695b0e6a355fcd7ea717ccf63ac82400c0f.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Hostile Animal</summary>

![Hostile animal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p3SdrGdw/images/9d192883548666243a81660d49cfdb0ff2f08c05.png)
![Shark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p3SdrGdw/images/bcdf88ec9f699d417a5447406ac1bd7dbe78c3e4.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Neutral Animal</summary>

![Neutral animal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p3SdrGdw/images/650c33eb118eacf68c3a5558556ce3adc8f39362.png)
</details>


<details>
<summary>Passive Animal</summary>

![Passive Animal 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p3SdrGdw/images/afc27cd610617f09d81543c624399a654d95a55f.png)
![Passive Animal 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p3SdrGdw/images/48ae59b9271e544ad48d30a212743352b4d7d717.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Armor</summary>

![Chain Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p3SdrGdw/images/dfcbd3e65f1f2c29df252ecd4915b3d76d8ae70e.png)
![Chainmail Armor Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p3SdrGdw/images/b0d9ce893bbbd16315369cba56c2209ab4ecd573.png)
![Studded Armor Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p3SdrGdw/images/b58df4721f85af65634cd800de50d0c0bfee2d61.png)
![Studded Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p3SdrGdw/images/9e51dd7a556c5b414b88f85f713c69de844df111.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Weapon : only with Forge</summary>

![Weapons Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p3SdrGdw/images/368f9cdc9dd3e676910bf69c9b47e2bc850c823b.png)
![Weapons picture 3P](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p3SdrGdw/images/e0a06aa955877467da0aa6e23c2f47fc3e1c4f1e.png)
![Spear picture 1P](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p3SdrGdw/images/3ba00072e89b9adc9a7ca51669c4b214f16d8b10.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Fluid</summary>
You can recover fat with a bucket once a humpback whale has been killed.
Fat can be ignited by fire if it comes into contact with it.
  
![Fat in water](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p3SdrGdw/images/98c319802ed8e99428b6b583bbca5e3819dbc6a3.png)
![Fat Bucket](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p3SdrGdw/images/7cb8d97b1b11763616f642d7a33a49f3b75120d6.png)
![Fat on fire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p3SdrGdw/images/c6fabd9e1ae483453cf5ec7f144c012b91852651.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Cosmetic</summary>

![Snow leopard, tiger and lion hides](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p3SdrGdw/images/03a64940be188db31987cce48b00b886a6d84828.png)
![Carpet Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p3SdrGdw/images/f05eae64da06eba9092c4bad96962268e8907bee.png)
![Cosmetic carpet with head](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p3SdrGdw/images/32afc84276a8600f6e08e99802a0acf79504944b.png)
</details>

Animals that can be breeding :
- Duck = Kelp
- Turkey = Wheat seeds
- Antelope = Wheat
- Deer = Wheat
- Wild Boar = Brown Mushroom
- Squirrel = Beetroot

Animal taming :
- Squirrel = Brown Mushroom

Other :
The Cave Troll can only appear in caves, so it's not possible to make it appear with a Cave Troll egg if it's not in a cave.
